name: Bologna Omelet
recipeIngredient: 1/2 slice Bologna, cut into small pieces
1 slice American cheese, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a bowl.
2. Heat a preheated, greased frying pan over medium heat.
3. Pour the mixture into the pan and cook until set.
4. Turn once to ensure even cooking.
5. Remove from heat and serve.
